scripts.preinstall: sh -c 'rm -f package-lock.json yarn.lock; case "$npm_config_user_agent" in pnpm/*) ;; *) echo "Use pnpm instead" >&2; exit 1 ;; esac'
scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
scripts.build:web: cd artifacts/beerio-kart && PORT=5000 BASE_PATH=/ vite build --config vite.config.ts
scripts.build:all: pnpm run build:web && pnpm run build:api
scripts.prod: pnpm run build:all && pnpm run start
scripts.dev:api: cd artifacts/api-server && PORT=5000 pnpm run dev
scripts.dev:web: cd artifacts/beerio-kart && PORT=3000 BASE_PATH=/ vite --config vite.config.ts
